title: Extend state machine for Phase 1 flow
description:
Extend fo-experience.tsx with steps 7-11:
- Step 7: Screen 7 (step-ready) — shows ready message, Continue advances to step 8
- Step 8: AffirmationCardFlow batch 1 (5 cards, X of 20 counter, totalLovedSoFar=0)
  On complete → Thinking D → generate batch 2 with feedback
- Step 9: AffirmationCardFlow batch 2 (5 cards, totalLovedSoFar=batch1loved)
  On complete → Thinking E → generate batch 3 with feedback
- Step 10: AffirmationCardFlow batch 3 (5 cards, totalLovedSoFar=batch1+2loved)
  On complete → Thinking F → generate batch 4 with feedback
- Step 11: AffirmationCardFlow batch 4 (5 cards, totalLovedSoFar=batch1+2+3loved)
  On complete → Thinking G (3 messages) → placeholder step 12

Thinking screen messages:
D: ['Noticing what resonates…', 'Your next affirmations are taking shape…']
E: ['Refining your affirmations further…']
F: ['Polishing the final details…']
G: ['Saving your preferences…', 'Saving the affirmations you love…', 'Creating your personal feed…']

Each thinking screen triggers generateAffirmationBatchFO13 with batchSize=5, passing accumulated loved/discarded.
closed_reason: Extended state machine to steps 7-12 with 4x5 card review flow, thinking screens D-G, and feedback-driven regeneration
